name: Stuffed Green Peppers (Oven Bag)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Place the large size (14 x 20") oven cooking bag in a 12 x 8 x 2 baking dish.
3. In a small bowl, combine flour, tomato paste, water, and sugar. Reserve 1/3 cup of the sauce for the meat mixture; pour the remaining sauce into the bag.
4. Brown ground beef in a skillet. Add onion and garlic; cook until transparent. Drain excess fat.
5. Stir in cheese, rice, salt, pepper, and tomato sauce. Remove tops and seeds from green peppers; stuff with meat mixture.
6. Place stuffed peppers in the bag. Close the bag with a nylon tie; make 6 half-inch slits on top.
7. Bake for 30 to 40 minutes or until peppers are tender. To serve, spoon sauce over the stuffed peppers. Serves 6.
